notes: Refined the page around the natural Arabic question form: متى تبدأ الدراسة in core SEO-facing copy while preserving keyword coverage for weaker query variants.

Strengthened the family-facing timeline with the Saturday 12 September {{year}} start, the 6 September {{year}} international-school start, the 24 June {{nextYear}} year-end, and the gradual student-entry context.
Added clearer practical planning signals so the page answers the date question and the what-do-I-do-next question together.
Focused validation passed with validate-holiday-content, ESLint, typecheck, and seo:validate.
Generated holiday bundles were not regenerated because events:build was intentionally not run, so the rendered route can still lag behind the authored package.
